summary: Backend API testing completed for Quadley Admin Features. 16/18 tests passed (89%). All key admin features verified: dashboard stats, events edit/delete, late meals CRUD, user search security. Rate limiting (429) caused 1 test skip and 1 failure - expected behavior.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) triggered after multiple login attempts - affects testing but is expected security behavior

admin_dashboard_stats.details: GET /api/stats returns total_users=25, active_events=75, pending_requests=7, pending_applications=7

admin_edit_event.details: PUT /api/events/{id} successfully updates event title, description, location, category

admin_delete_event.details: DELETE /api/events/{id} successfully removes event from database

admin_view_all_late_meals.details: GET /api/dining/late-meals returns ALL late meal requests (not just admin's own)

admin_edit_any_late_meal.details: PUT /api/dining/late-meals/{id} allows admin to edit any user's late meal request

admin_delete_any_late_meal.details: DELETE /api/dining/late-meals/{id} allows admin to delete any user's late meal request

user_search_admin_full_data.details: GET /api/users/search returns email, role, floor for admin users

user_search_student_limited_data.details: GET /api/users/search returns ONLY id, first_name, last_name, name, photo_url for students - NO email exposed

user_search_ra_limited_data.details: GET /api/users/search returns limited data for RA users - NO email exposed

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ /api/stats endpoint correctly counts total_users, active_events, pending_requests, pending_applications
✓ /api/users/search correctly limits data exposure - students/RAs cannot see email, only admins can
✓ /api/dining/late-meals allows admin to view/edit/delete ANY user's late meal requests
✓ /api/events allows admin to edit/delete events with proper authorization checks
✓ All provided credentials work correctly (gen@quadley.app, alice@example.com, epink@icloud.com)

success_rate.backend: 89% (16/18 tests passed, 1 skipped due to rate limiting, 1 failed due to rate limiting)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin features verified working. Rate limiting on /api/auth/login (5/minute) may cause test failures if running multiple login tests in quick succession. User search security fix confirmed - students cannot see email addresses. All 3 credential sets provided work correctly.
